description: PayMaxi presents itself as a fintech product development company building payment and financial software. On its public paymaxi.com properties, the only documented programmatic interface found is a hosted One-Time Secret service API on a paymaxi.com subdomain.
summary: paymaxi.com exposes one documented developer integration surface on a paymaxi.com subdomain: the One-Time Secret HTTP API, authenticated with HTTP Basic using an account login and API token.
